ev5_semantics.v2: enstrophy-weighted mean dyadic shell; lane2 is its bucket (legacy mode: active j_max)
ev5_semantics.v3: adjacent cascade-flux ratio E[j_max+1]/E[j_max], diagnostic only and excluded from Q_log
ev5_semantics.v7: dissipative enstrophy tail fraction above K*(nu)=floor(3/4*log2(1/nu)) (legacy mode: peak-shell fraction)
ev5_semantics.v11: Z/3 phase-coherence proxy outside canonical FRACTRAN rules
ev5_semantics.theta_profile: finite vector over fixed cutoffs k>=K_star and observed transition times: theta(k,t)=abs(nonlinear_tail_flux_proxy)/viscous_tail_dissipation_proxy; Theta=sup_k theta_k; danger shell is argmax profile; ns_margin=Diss-|Flux| and ns_margin_ratio=1-theta; monotonicity is not assumed; missing/zero dissipation fails closed

lane_boundary: Projection dictionary and numerical diagnostics only; not an EV5 transfer theorem, not an actual-flow Navier-Stokes estimate, and not Clay evidence.
evidence_boundary: 2D CFD evidence only; no 3D NS proof or Clay promotion.
